core_skills: Full-stack development, React, TypeScript, C#, Python

must_have_quals: Candidate must possess a bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Computer/Software Engineering, or an equivalent degree, Must have a minimum of 4 years of professional software development experience (or 2 years of experience with master's degree), Must have experience in designing and maintaining software products and implementing software designs, Must have experience in software development, data structures, object-oriented design, and effective unit testing, Should have experience with software best practices such as peer reviews and document generation, Must have experience with Javascript, Must have experience with containerization technologies, Must have experience working in Agile or scrum environment
preferred_quals: Experience with computer vision or AI is a plus, Experience leading scrum teams is a plus
core_responsibilities: Building responsive front-end applications (React, TypeScript) and scalable back-end services (C#, Python, or Node.js), Proficiency in containerization tools such as Docker or Podman, Developing or integrating AI and computer vision capabilities into web-based or edge-deployed applications
job_summary: Leidos is an industry and technology leader serving government and commercial customers with smarter, more efficient digital and mission innovations. The company is seeking a mid-level Software Developer with expertise in modern web technologies and full-stack development to build responsive front-end applications and scalable back-end services, operating within an Agile/Scrum team environment.
